name: Stream RealtimeDatabase
description: Stream data from Firebase Realtime Database with optional full-node output.

inputParameters.name: config_filepath
inputParameters.description: Path to Firebase Realtime Database configuration JSON file.

inputParameters.name: return_full_data
inputParameters.description: If true, output full subtree at subscribed path; if false, output raw event delta.

outputParameters.name: event_path
outputParameters.description: Path in the streamed node where the event occurred.

outputParameters.name: data
outputParameters.description: Event payload (delta or full subtree depending on return_full_data).
